description: baseline: faithful Python port of supplemental.js from A1-AI-Core. Advisory-only source policy: dedupe by sourceUrl||title, sort by score desc, cap at 3, excerpt sliced to 280. 10 cases x 6 fields (count, titles, excerpts, sourceUrls, scores, allAdvisory), all 100. Smallest example in the suite (44 lines JS, ~80 lines Python).
